html:
The Walrus Tusk is an Item sometimes dropped by MacTusk. Walrus Tusks can be used to craft the Walking Cane and Brush at an Alchemy Engine.

Downloadable Content

Walrus Tusks are also included in the Hamlet DLC. However, they can only be bought for 50 Oincs each at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

Trivia

  • Before the The End is Nigh update, the Walrus Tusk had no use.

“This would be useful for scrimshaw.”
–Wickerbottom
“He had a cavity, eh?”
–Woodie
“I'll put this to better use.”
–Maxwell
“Just as I suspected. It's a big tooth.”
–Wagstaff
“Rended fröm the möuth öf the sea beast.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe we can use it for arts and crafts.”
–Webber
“That's a pretty impressive tooth.”
–Walani
“It won't be needing this anymore.”
–Warly
“Ye'd make a fancy new peg leg.”
–Woodlegs
“YOUR OWN SELF BE TOOTH”
–Wilba
“Tooth branch”
–Wormwood
“Big deal, it's a tooth. I have a bunch of them in my mouth.”
–Wheeler
“Get a load of this chomper!”
–Winona
“A sideways horn for a wizened face.”
–Wortox
“Took his tooth!”
–Wurt
“Oof... I don't think he brushed.”
–Walter
“I should pocket it for future tinkering.”
–Wanda
The Walrus Tusk is an Item sometimes dropped by MacTusk. Walrus Tusks can be used to craft the Walking Cane and Brush at an Alchemy Engine.
Downloadable Content[edit | edit source]
Walrus Tusks are also included in the Hamlet DLC. However, they can only be bought for 50 Oincs each at 'The Sty' Oddities Emporium in the Pig City.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngà hải mã là một Vật phẩm đôi khi bị MacTusk đánh rơi. Ngà Hải Mã có thể được sử dụng để chế tạo Gậy Đi Bộ và Bàn Chải tại Máy Luyện Kim.

The '''Walrus Tusk''' is an [[Item]] sometimes dropped by [[MacTusk]]. Walrus Tusks can be used to craft the [[Walking Cane]] and [[Brush]] at an [[Alchemy Engine]].
=={{Pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content ==
Walrus Tusks are also included in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. However, they can only be bought for 50 [[Oinc]]s each at [['The Sty' Oddities Emporium]] in the [[Pig City]].

=={{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Walrus Tusk
|item2 = Gold Nugget
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Twigs
|count3 = 4
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Walking Cane}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Walrus Tusk
|item2 = Steel Wool
|item3 = Gold Nugget
|count3 = 2
|tool = Alchemy Engine
|result = Brush}}
=={{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* Before the ''[[Don't Starve/Version History#April 9, 2013 - The End is Nigh|The End is Nigh]]'' update, the Walrus Tusk had no use.
